_doc: Drives the Lite build (release.sh --lite). 'remove' = Pro-only whole files deleted from the Lite package. 'replace' = optional source(repo-root) -> target(staged) file swaps (currently none). Inline Pro fragments in SHARED files are handled separately by @pro/@endpro markers stripped by strip-pro.js. Keep this in lockstep with the markers: a removed file must have all its imports/usages wrapped in @pro markers, or the Lite webpack build will fail.
